code: import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import{GangInvitePopupView}from"./GangInvitePopupView";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const GangInviteContainer=()=>{const[inviter,setInviter]=useState("");const[gangName,setGangName]=useState("");const[visible,setVisible]=useState(false);useEffect(()=>{const handler=event=>{console.log('[POPUP EVENT]',event.detail);if(!event.detail||!event.detail.inviter||!event.detail.gangName){window.postMessage({type:'notification',message:'Something went wrong with get Inviter'});return;}const{inviter,gangName}=event.detail;setInviter(inviter);setGangName(gangName);setVisible(true);};window.addEventListener('gang_invite_popup',handler);return()=>window.removeEventListener('gang_invite_popup',handler);},[]);const handleAccept=()=>{setVisible(false);window.postMessage({type:"gang_invite_response",accepted:true});};const handleDecline=()=>{setVisible(false);window.postMessage({type:"gang_invite_response",accepted:false});};if(!visible)return null;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(GangInvitePopupView,{inviter:inviter,gangName:gangName,onAccept:handleAccept,onDecline:handleDecline});};
